subject: Re: Weekend plans - are we still on?
body: Hey Priya! Yeah we're definitely still on for Saturday, don't worry :) I checked the weather again this morning and it's supposed to be clear all day which is honestly such a relief because last time we planned this it rained the entire weekend lol. So here's the plan - I'll pick you up around 9am? The trail takes about 3 hours so we should reach the top well before afternoon. Ankit said he'll meet us there directly since he's coming from the other side of the city. Oh also - I found this amazing little dhaba just 2km from the trailhead, we could stop there on the way back. Their reviews are insane, apparently the dal makhani is to die for. I'm already looking forward to that more than the hike lol. Can you bring the portable speaker? I forgot it last time and the silence was honestly getting to me after a while. And maybe some extra snacks? I have water and the sandwiches covered. One more thing - Neha asked if she can join. I told her probably yes but wanted to check with you first since you know her better than I do. Let me know by tonight? Okay I think that's everything. Super excited, it's been way too long since we did something like this! See you Saturday! Rahul P.S. Don't forget sunscreen this time, you literally turned red last time lmao

subject: Project update - Q4 roadmap
body: Hi team, hope everyone's doing well! I wanted to share a quick update on the Q4 roadmap. We've completed 3 out of 5 milestones ahead of schedule which is great news. The remaining two should be done by end of month. I've attached the updated Gantt chart. Let me know if you have questions or concerns. Also - office party is on the 20th, please RSVP by Friday. subject: Lunch plans?
body: Hey! Are you free for lunch on Thursday? I was thinking we could try that new place that opened near the office. They apparently have amazing biryani. Also I finally watched that movie you recommended - it was SO good, why didn't you tell me it would make me cry lol. Let me know about Thursday! :)

subject: Weekend hiking trip
body: Hey guys! So excited for the trip this weekend. I checked the weather and it looks perfect - sunny with mild temperatures. I've packed the tent and sleeping bags. Can someone bring the portable stove? Also Rohit please don't forget the map this time haha. We should leave by 6am to reach the trail before it gets crowded. Anyone need a ride from the station? Let me know. Can't wait!

subject: Corizo Edutech Hiring – Business Operation Executive Opportunity
body: Dear Students, Greetings from the Training & Placement Cell! We are pleased to inform you about a *career opportunity with Corizo Edutech* for the role of *Business Operation Executive*. ------------------------------ 📌 Job Details: - *Role:* Business Operation Executive - *Location:* Bangalore (Work from Office) 💼 Compensation: - *Probation (First 3 Months):* ₹18,000/month + Incentives (up to ₹10,000) - *Full-Time:* ₹4 LPA (Fixed) + ₹2.5 LPA (Variable) ------------------------------ 🎯 Roles & Responsibilities: - Engage with potential customers and build strong relationships - Manage and maintain a sales pipeline - Conduct follow-ups and client communication - Develop engagement strategies and close sales effectively - Collaborate with internal teams for improved performance ------------------------------ ✅ Eligibility & Skills Required: - Good verbal and written communication skills (preferably English) - Strong persuasion and negotiation abilities - Self-motivated with problem-solving mindset - Ability to work in a team and handle pressure - Quick learner with attention to detail ------------------------------ 📝 Selection Process: - Group Discussion - HR Round - Business Round ------------------------------ 🌟 Why This Opportunity? - Fast-growing organization with strong industry presence - Opportunity to develop *business, communication, and sales skills* - Exposure to real-world challenges and client interactions - Potential for *fast career growth and leadership roles* ------------------------------ ⚠ Important: Interested students are requested to *share their willingness/apply through the link shared separately* at the earliest to facilitate the campus drive process. Students are encouraged to carefully evaluate the role and apply if it aligns with their career interests. https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLSeWzL54TiLORG_XS_ARmNXCD6HDaeA_S6HNYuxCFy5e59h5ow/viewform?usp=dialog Thank you & Best Regards, Training & Placement Team, Indian Institute of Information Technology Tiruchirappalli, Sethurapatti, Trichy-Madurai Highway Tiruchirappalli-620012.

subject: AI Is Becoming The New Storefront
body: Commerce Media Radar By DaVinci Commerce By DaVinci Commerce Read this article on LinkedIn to join the conversation Read on LinkedIn https://www.linkedin.com/comm/pulse/ai-becoming-new-storefront-davincicommerce-zuske?lipi=urn%3Ali%3Apage%3Aemail_email_series_follow_newsletter_01%3BIqeNyiorS5S5wJgWW4vhyQ%3D%3D&midToken=AQG-PfwWt6QZ5Q&midSig=1aa3SyU7-RCcc1&trk=eml-email_series_follow_newsletter_01-null-0-read_more_banner_cta_&trkEmail=eml-email_series_follow_newsletter_01-null-0-read_more_banner_cta_-null-o5as7e~mnrnjvs6~nm-null-null&eid=o5as7e-mnrnjvs6-nm&otpToken=MTMwMTE4ZTAxMjI2YzBjMGI1MjYwZmViNDExOWUyYjM4YmM3ZDc0NTkwYTg4ZTZlN2JjZTAzNjY0ZDUyNWNmNmYxZDJkM2U5NThlOGI5YzA3YzkwYWRiMWVhZjU5YzQ0ODI4Nzc0YzAyYTMxYjBlNzAzZWNlYTEwLDEsMQ%3D%3D In 2025, 40% of consumers used AI for shopping assistance. And that number is bound to rise in the months and years to come. LLMs are quickly becoming a touchpoint for discovering products. According to EMARKETER, 80% of respondents say they expect to use it more for shopping, especially to help them make decisions. AI will be used by shoppers throughout the marketing funnel, from awareness to purchase. This big consumer shift is an exciting opportunity that, unfortunately, exposes a big problem for brands. Without active management, brands will be reduced to mere data points, such as price and available quantities. As a result, these raw numbers will heavily influence a consumer's decision to purchase. All the efforts marketers have put into their branding experience won’t show up in the AI storefront. Marketers try to address this branding gap with GEO, but that will only go so far in sharing the brand experience with consumers. It leaves a lot outside of the brand’s full control. This branding gap in AI is the primary motivation for our exciting new announcement. DaVinci Commerce has officially launched the DaVinci Brandstore, bringing the full brand experience to LLM platforms. We’ve given our website a new look to celebrate, which you can check out here. DaVinci Commerce Launches the DaVinci Brandstore By leveraging several AI agents, DaVinci Brandstore delivers personalized brand experiences within LLMs. It allows brands to turn product feeds and brand content into intent-driven discovery journeys. Read our full press release here. Watch our explainer video below. Confusion For Brands And Retailers at Shoptalk 2026 At Shoptalk 2026, DaVinci Commerce founder Diaz Nesamoney chatted with representatives from 20 brands and retailers about the limits of GEO and the need for branded experiences to have a home in LLMs. “There are now over 250 apps in ChatGPT, so it's a model that's gaining traction for deeper brand engagement within ChatGPT. The rich user experience lends itself to a "store-like" experience.” -Diaz Nesamoney You can read his full post here. Dinner and AI-led Commerce Roundtable With Accenture Song and Forrester Accenture and Forrester co-hosted an engaging Shoptalk Dinner with DaVinci Commerce leadership. The main point of discussion was how quickly AI is becoming the next storefront. Participants were very interested in the notion of an AI-native conversations storefront that goes far beyond mere mention. You read more about the evening here. Accenture's strategic investment in DaVinci Commerce Accenture is investing in the DaVinci Commerce as part of its plan to help clients navigate the shift from human-led shopping to agentic AI-assisted purchases. The investment also includes a strategic partnership with Accenture Song, which will see DaVinci Commerce used to help Accenture clients utilize agentic AI across the full value chain. “As people increasingly rely on AI‑assisted recommendations and begin delegating decisions to intelligent agents—being discoverable is no longer enough. Brands must be relevant, personable, and ready to transact in agent‑led environments. DaVinci Commerce enables exactly that.” -Ndidi Oteh, CEO of Accenture Song Is Your Storefront Dead? The Rise of Age
